affordances.name: Process inspection next-question gate
affordances.mechanism: When the work is moving on autopilot, require the answer to inspect how the conclusion was reached, name the next discriminating question, and connect that question to a concrete step rather than endless reflection.

use_when: The path could change if the team asked a better question about assumptions, strategy choice, or evidence quality.
The team can produce answers quickly but cannot explain how it knows or where the reasoning chain may be weak.
Self-monitoring can prevent drift before the default pattern carries the work forward.
do_not_use_when: The next discriminating question is already explicit and tied to action.
Self-questioning would postpone commitment, experimentation, or ownership.
The problem is execution of a known step, not inspection of how the team is reasoning.
case_evidence_needed: The method, assumption, or evidence chain that produced it.
The next question that would change the path.
The concrete action, test, or owner attached to that question.

treatment_requirements.description: Require the answer to name the next question that would change the path, explain why that question matters, and tie it to a bounded action, evidence check, or owner.
evidence_required: The reasoning method used to reach it.
The weak point or assumption in that method.
The next action or evidence check that follows from the question.
good_output_shape: Names how the current conclusion was reached.
Connects the question to evidence, action, or ownership.
Stops self-questioning from becoming infinite deferral.

diagnostic_questions: How did this answer decide what mattered?
What next question would actually change the path?
What action, test, or owner follows from asking that question?
misuse_guards: Do not add recursive self-questioning that delays commitment without sharpening the next move.
Do not inspect only what the strategy is while ignoring how it will be executed.
Do not let metacognitive language clutter the packet when the user already has an action-bound question.

source_evidence.source_quote: Most useful when better questions will change the path
Works when the team must explain how it knows
Best when self-monitoring can prevent drift

review_notes.normalization_note: Batch 10 outcome: strong_affordance_record. The source supports a bounded next-question gate that makes reasoning inspectable without infinite deferral.
dropped_material: Did not extract prompt-engineering material because PR45 is not prompt work.
Did not extract broad self-awareness or learning-development material as separate cards.
open_questions: PR46 should test whether this card improves packet handoff without adding metacognitive clutter.

absence_records.reason: The source warns that reflective questions become misuse when they postpone commitment, experimentation, or ownership instead of sharpening the next move.

source_evidence.source_quote: Danger When Self-Questioning Becomes Infinite Deferral

absence_records.reason: The source says strategy can fail when questioning stays on what is right while ignoring the executable how.

review_notes.normalization_note: Batch 10 source reading found strong reviewed depth for metacognitive-questioning as a bounded process-inspection next-question gate.
dropped_material: No runtime, prompt, lane, packet, deterministic pressure, or user-facing change is implied.
open_questions: Later packet review should test whether the card produces useful next-question discipline rather than introspection theater.
